name_en: Small Size 18cm "High-end Quality Customization" 🚩🚩🚩 Exclusive Custom Release, Upgraded New OHANEL 24K Autumn/Winter New Makeup Bag 🆕 The makeup bag is a popular style favored by Chanel. Elegant and noble, it can serve as a vintage makeup box for various collections. The body features a double C logo, full of vintage retro style, and the capacity is huge. The shape is structured and suitable for various occasions. It can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody! It also features an automatic lock, all-steel 14k pale gold buckle, and imported sheepskin~ soft to the touch and worth buying, looking noble everywhere! Official website sync: 12.5 X 18 X 6.5 cm
